summary: Completed testing of Edit Time Record feature (hora_inicio/hora_fim). Backend API fully functional (9/9 tests passed). Frontend edit modal working correctly with Hora Início and Hora Fim fields. Fixed critical frontend bug in useOfflineData hook that was causing infinite loading.

tests: GET /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/registos-tecnicos - Returns registos with hora_inicio_segmento and hora_fim_segmento
PUT /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/registos-tecnicos/{id} - Updates hora_inicio and hora_fim correctly
PUT endpoint recalculates codigo (time code) based on start time
PUT endpoint handles overnight shifts (hora_fim < hora_inicio)
PUT endpoint preserves existing times when only updating km
PUT endpoint returns 404 for non-existent registo
PUT endpoint returns 403 for unauthorized requests
Partial hora update (only inicio without fim) doesn't change times
Edit modal displays 'Horário do Registo' section with Hora Início and Hora Fim fields
Fields have correct data-testid attributes (edit-registo-hora-inicio, edit-registo-hora-fim)
Duration is calculated automatically when both times are set
Tempo Trabalhado field is disabled when hora_inicio and hora_fim are set
Guardar button sends hora_inicio and hora_fim to backend
Success toast 'Registo atualizado!' shown after save
Table updates with new time values after save

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: useOfflineData.js cacheData function was hanging indefinitely due to unawaited IndexedDB operations. Added timeout wrapper to prevent infinite loading.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/hooks/useOfflineData.js - Added timeout to cacheData function to prevent infinite loading
/app/backend/tests/test_edit_time_record.py - Created comprehensive test suite for edit time record feature
seed_data_creation: Used existing OT #356 (560Lab) and its registos for testing

edit_time_record.modal_fields: Hora Início and Hora Fim fields present with correct data-testid
edit_time_record.duration_calculation: Automatically calculates duration when both times are set
edit_time_record.backend_update: PUT endpoint correctly updates hora_inicio_segmento, hora_fim_segmento, minutos_trabalhados, and codigo
edit_time_record.persistence: Changes persist in database and reflect in UI

context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit time record feature is fully implemented and tested. The useOfflineData hook was fixed to prevent infinite loading - added timeout wrapper to cacheData function. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_edit_time_record.py can be used for regression testing. OT #356 (560Lab) has multiple registos that can be used for testing.

bug_fix_applied.issue: cacheData function was hanging indefinitely due to unawaited IndexedDB operations
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added 5-second timeout wrapper using Promise.race() to prevent infinite loading. Also properly awaited all IndexedDB put operations.
